titleStmt.title: Letter from Valentine Dunn to Robert Chalmers Esq., 19 June, 1916
Letters 1916-1923
titleStmt.author: Valentine Dunn

editionStmt.p: This work was originally published by Maynooth University in Ireland in 2017. In 2026 this data, stored in a relational database was extracted and converted into this TEI/XML document.

availability.p: This is an open access work licensed under Creative Commons Attribution NonCommercial 4.0 International license (CC BY-NC 4.0).

note.p: A letter from Valentine Dunn to Sir Robert Chalmers (1858 - 1938). The writer submits his application for the vacant position of Clerk of Crown and Peace for Co. Westmeath. He outlines his professional experience which includes acting as Deputy Clerk Crown. Sir Robert Chalmers was sent to Ireland as replacement under-secretary for Sir Matthew Nathan (1862-1939), who had resigned along with Augustine Birrell, his chief secretary, following the outbreak of the Easter Rising in 1916.

msIdentifier.collection: Chief Secretary's Office Registered Papers, CSO RP/1916/5615/10330

projectDesc.p: The data in these XML files was generated based on a data dump from the Magellan database (https://github.com/Maynooth-Center-for-Digital-Humanities/Magellan). Each database record has been converted to a JSON file (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/json). The element section of the JSON file contains the TEI-encoded contents of the letters. The TEI XML has been cleaned and made well-formed using a Python script (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/src).

body.ab:
V. & W. DUNN. SOLICITORS VALENTINE DUNN COMMISSIONER FOR AFFIDAVITS Robert Chalmers Esq Assistant Secy Dublin Castle 60 Middle Abbey St. Dublin 19 June 1916 Sir I submit my application for
appointment to the vacant office of
Clerk Crown & Peace County Westmeath.
The duties attached to the office I am
fully conversant, having been Registrar
to the County Court Judge Curran for
29 years. I having to relinquish the
position as provided by the Statute on
thehis retirement some two years since.
During my term as Registrar I at times
acted as Deputy Clerk Crown not only
in the County mentioned but in the other
Counties over which the Judge presided Trusting my application will be favourable entertained I am
Your obt Servant Valentine Dunn
